# graphql/AddEmailPattern

## Overview

Add a single email pattern for a company. Delegates to Lambda Email runtime pattern endpoint.

## GraphQL operation

```graphql
mutation AddEmailPattern($input: AddEmailPatternInput!) { email { addEmailPattern(input: $input) { uuid companyUuid patternFormat patternString domain } } }
```
